news.headline: Ransom note claims Nancy Guthrie died after abduction
news.summary: The note from the possible kidnappers reportedly stated that they did not mean for her to die and included an apology to the family.

news.headline: Ghalibaf: US and Iran can work together to reopen Strait of Hormuz
news.summary: Iran’s chief negotiator said the Strait will never return to the way it was before the war.
